verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I know I’ve failed you, as I struggle on And I keep getting weaker, I need someone that’s strong Oh so reach down once again Lord, as I go on my knees While I’m still holding on, And hold on to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus take a hold, and hold on to me I’m the weakest of your children Oh how I need Thee… And if I should make it thru the only way it will be Is that Jesus take a hold, and hold on to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes I feel unworthy, sometimes I feel ashamed, Cause I can’t offer more to glorify Thy name; Lord I need to see your presence, oh how I need Thee So Jesus take a hold, and hold on to me.
